author: Siliconera
text:
Zenonia 1 Demo Debuts on Steam
Zenonia 1 is coming back again and the first demo for the returning RPG is now live on PCs via Steam.

author: Siliconera
text:
Silent Hill 2 and f Characters Appear as Machiboke Still Waiting for You Figures
The next Still Waiting for You Machiboke Gashapon figures will be characters from Silent Hill 2 remake and f.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Shonen Jump Manga Hal Formula Is a WF1 Racing Series
The newest sports manga in Shonen Jump is a World Formula 1 racing series called Hal Formula.

author: Siliconera
text:
Genshin Impact Anime Short Stars the Marionette Sandrone
"The Final Gift" Genshin Impact anime short is a seven minute animated video dedicated to The Marionette Harbinger Sandrone.

author: Siliconera
text:
Build Evangelion EVA Unit 01 and 02 With Nanoblock Kits This Fall
Two Evangelion Nanoblock sets that let us build EVA Unit-01 and Unit-02 will both show up in Japan and the US.

author: Siliconera
text:
Dead by Daylight Getting Silent Hill’s Hinako and Bubble Head Nurse
More Dead by Daylight Silent Hill crossovers are coming as f Heroine Hinako and Bubble Head Nurse prepare to debut.

author: Siliconera
text:
Hatsune Miku Becoming a Persona 5: The Phantom X Character
The next playable crossover character headed to Persona 5: The Phantom X is the Vocaloid Hatsune Miku.

author: Siliconera
text:
Capcom Celebrating Father’s Day With Pragmata in Japan
The company will launch a live stream with the game's Japanese voice actors three days earlier.

author: Siliconera
text:
Review: My Little Puppy Oozes Charm
My Little Puppy is about the journey one dog makes to finally reunite with the person he loves, and it’s filled with touching moments.

author: Siliconera
text:
My Favorite Vtuber Is Scary IRL Volume 2 Focuses on Communication
Volume 2 of the My Favorite Vtuber Is Scary IRL manga succeeds because these folks are communicating even when it's difficult.
